mapper.select: SELECT medication_id AS medicationId, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, drug_name AS drugName, ingredient, dose, intake_time AS intakeTime, interval_hour AS intervalHour, memo, daily_count AS dailyCount, recommended FROM medication WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY medication_id DESC

SELECT medication_id AS medicationId, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, drug_name AS drugName, ingredient, dose, intake_time AS intakeTime, interval_hour AS intervalHour, memo, daily_count AS dailyCount, recommended FROM medication WHERE medication_id = #{medicationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medication ( user_id, item_seq, -- ⭐ 추가 drug_name, ingredient, dose, intake_time, interval_hour, memo, daily_count, recommended ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{itemSeq}, -- ⭐ 추가 #{drugName}, #{ingredient}, #{dose}, #{intakeTime}, #{intervalHour}, #{memo}, #{dailyCount}, #{recommended} )
mapper.select: SELECT log_id AS logId, medication_id AS medicationId, user_id AS userId, taken_index AS takenIndex, taken_at AS takenAt FROM medication_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(taken_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY taken_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE medication SET drug_name = #{drugName}, ingredient = #{ingredient}, dose = #{dose}, intake_time = #{intakeTime}, interval_hour = #{intervalHour}, memo = #{memo}, daily_count = #{dailyCount}, recommended = #{recommended} WHERE medication_id = #{medicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT medication_id AS medicationId, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, -- ⭐ 추가 drug_name AS drugName, ingredient, dose, intake_time AS intakeTime, interval_hour AS intervalHour, memo, daily_count AS dailyCount, recommended FROM medication ORDER BY medication_id ASC

SELECT log_id AS logId, medication_id AS medicationId, user_id AS userId, taken_index AS takenIndex, taken_at AS takenAt FROM medication_log WHERE medication_id = #{medicationId} AND DATE(taken_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY taken_index ASC

SELECT medication_id, item_seq, -- 낱알식별 코드 혹은 의약품 코드 item_name, -- 제품명 entp_name, -- 회사명 drug_shape, -- 모양 color_class1, -- 색상 print_front -- 앞면 각인 FROM medication_master WHERE item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY item_name LIMIT 30

SELECT log_id AS logId, medication_id AS medicationId, user_id AS userId, taken_index AS takenIndex, taken_at AS takenAt FROM medication_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(taken_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY taken_at ASC
